name: SakuttoWorks-Agent-Commerce-OS-Catalog
description: The official MCP catalog for Sakutto Works Agent-Commerce-OS. Provides middleware tools for RAG pipeline integration and web data normalization.

authentication.instruction: Obtain quota entitlement from https://buy.polar.sh/polar_cl_mps3G1hmCTmQWDYYEMY2G1c7sojN3Tul6IhjO4EtVuj. Billed at $0.10 per successful normalization.

tools.name: normalize_web_data
tools.description: Extracts and normalizes unstructured web content (e.g., Japanese tech regulation sites, academic papers) into clean, agent-readable Markdown or JSON. Strips HTML noise and optimizes for RAG.

url.description: The target URL to extract data from.
